name: Asus
transcript:
[22:31:22] USER: Thank you for calling Asus, please, listen carefully, as our menu options, have changed for quality and training purposes. All of your calls may be monitored and recorded to dial by extension number, please press 1.
[22:31:25] SYSTEM: [IVR Menu incomplete - found: Press 1 for dial by extension number. Waiting for more options...]
[22:31:38] USER: Top pieces support, please press 2 for motherboard, Wireless graphic, cards, and monitor support. Please, press 3, for Easter or eShop support. Please press 4.
[22:31:40] SYSTEM: [IVR Menu incomplete - found: Press 2 for pc support, Press 3 for motherboard, wireless, graphic cards, and monitor support, Press 4 for acer or eshop support. Waiting for more options...]
[22:31:50] USER: Thank you for calling Asus, please listen carefully, as our menu options have changed.
[22:31:59] USER: All of your calls may be monitored and recorded to dial by extension number, please press 1.
[22:32:02] DTMF: 4 — AI selected: This is a repeating IVR menu. Earlier turns already revealed options 1 through 4, and the best available path toward a live representative is the catch-all support option on 4.
[22:32:02] IVR MENU: 1=dial by extension number, 2=pc support, 3=motherboard, wireless, graphic cards, and monitor support, 4=estore or eshop support
[22:32:14] USER: I did not recognize that, is a valid entry. Thank you for calling Asus, please listen carefully, as our menu options have changed.
[22:32:17] DTMF: 2 — AI selected: The IVR is repeating the same menu after an invalid entry. This is a loop, and the menu was already fully heard earlier. For speaking with a representative, PC support is the best available path.
[22:32:17] IVR MENU: 1=dial by extension number, 2=pc support, 3=motherboard, wireless, graphic cards, and monitor support, 4=estore or eshop support
[22:32:30] USER: I did not recognize that, is a valid entry. Thank you for calling Asus, please listen carefully, as our menu options have changed for quality and training purposes.
[22:32:42] USER: To dial by extension number, please press 1, for notebooks, tablet, mobile or desktop PC. Support, please press 2.
[22:32:46] IVR MENU: 1=dial by extension number, 2=notebooks, tablet, mobile or desktop pc support
[22:32:46] DTMF: 2 — AI selected: This is a repeated IVR menu and the current prompt explicitly offers PC support on 2, which is the best path toward reaching a representative.
[22:32:59] USER: I did not recognize that, is a valid entry. Thank you for calling Asus, please listen carefully, as our menu options have changed for quality and training purposes.
[22:33:06] USER: To dial by extension number, please  press 1.
